info.title: OctoConfigTool
info.description: Tool to upload json configuration to Octopus Deploy

commands.name: clear-library
commands.description: Removes ALL the variables in the specified library variable set

options.name: --library
options.description: Required. The Octopus Library to upload variables to

options.name: --roles
options.description: The Octopus role(s) to scope variables to

options.name: --file
options.description: Required. The json file to parse into variables

options.name: --environments
options.description: The Octopus Environment to scope variables to

options.name: --vaultUri
options.description: The Vault API URI

options.name: --vaultRole
options.description: The Role ID the app will run as

options.name: --secret
options.description: The Vault Secret ID associated with the Vault Role

options.name: --mountPoint
options.description:
(Default: ) The base mount point for the Vault secrets
engine

options.name: --variableType
options.description:
Required. The type of Octopus variables to convert the
json file into

options.name: --prefix
options.description: (Default: ) A Prefix to prepend to variables

options.name: --apikey
options.description: Required. The Octopus API key to use

options.name: --octotUri
options.description: Required. The Octopus API URI

options.name: --verbose
options.description: (Default: false) Max verbosity

options.name: --merge
options.description:
(Default: false) Forces json arrays to be merged into
one variable, rather than generated with idicies

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
